svg.title: CLIPittyClip Suite — wizard flow with tool triage
svg.desc: Top-level triage selects the tool, then routes to a per-tool wizard. Each lane shows existing prompts (gray) and proposed additions (red).
svg.text: CLIPittyClip Suite — proposed wizard with tool triage
User picks a tool first, then routes into a tool-specific wizard. Red = new prompt, corrected default, or renamed flag.

g.text: ◆ NEW: Tool Triage (top of wizard.sh entry)
"Which tool do you want to configure?"
If yes → ask for -x genome index
No structural change to existing flow

svg.text: Triage selects the tool, then each tool's wizard runs in isolation. CLIPittyClip gets the biggest overhaul; PREPittyPrep is built from scratch.
MAPittyMap and PEAKittyPeak have skeletal wizards today — they get focused extensions, not rewrites.
